icon.$description:
Icon size. A glyph rendered as a webfont is still an icon, not type: an icon
at 15px beside a label at 15px is not the same design decision as an icon at
16px. Kept out of fs for that reason.

xl.$description: Illustration-scale icon (EmptyState, ErrorState) — a distinct role from the 14/16/18 inline-control cluster.
